glosses.ja: アパート; マンション

sentences.target: On visite un nouvel appartement aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: On visite un nouvel appartement aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We’re visiting a new apartment today.
translations.es: Hoy vamos a ver un piso nuevo.
translations.de: Wir besichtigen heute eine neue Wohnung.
translations.it: Oggi andiamo a vedere un appartamento nuovo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天去看一套新公寓。
translations.yue: 我哋今日去睇一個新單位。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы идём смотреть новую квартиру.
translations.pt: Hoje vamos ver um apartamento novo.
translations.he: היום אנחנו הולכים לראות דירה חדשה.
translations.tr: Bugün yeni bir daire görmeye gidiyoruz.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi xem một căn hộ mới.
translations.nl: Vandaag gaan we een nieuw appartement bezichtigen.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми йдемо дивитися нову квартиру.
translations.hi: आज हम एक नया अपार्टमेंट देखने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα πάμε να δούμε ένα νέο διαμέρισμα.
translations.nb: I dag skal vi se på en ny leilighet.
translations.id: Hari ini kami akan melihat apartemen baru.
translations.sv: Idag ska vi titta på en ny lägenhet.
translations.ro: Astăzi mergem să vedem un apartament nou.
translations.cs: Dnes jdeme na prohlídku nového bytu.
translations.da: I dag skal vi se på en ny lejlighed.
translations.ja: 今日は新しいアパートを見に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal 'on' used colloquially to mean 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'appartement'.
Adjective; masculine singular pre-vocalic form of 'nouveau', modifying 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'visite'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates when the action occurs.

sentences.target: Ton appartement est au troisième étage.

translations.fr: Ton appartement est au troisième étage.
translations.en: Your apartment is on the third floor.
translations.es: Tu piso está en la tercera planta.
translations.de: Deine Wohnung ist im dritten Stock.
translations.it: Il tuo appartamento è al terzo piano.
translations.pt: Seu apartamento fica no terceiro andar.
translations.vi: Căn hộ của bạn ở tầng ba.
translations.nl: Jouw appartement is op de derde verdieping.
translations.hu: A lakásod a harmadik emeleten van.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा अपार्टमेंट तीसरी मंज़िल पर है.
translations.pl: Twoje mieszkanie jest na trzecim piętrze.
translations.el: Το διαμέρισμά σου είναι στον τρίτο όροφο.
translations.nb: Leiligheten din er i tredje etasje.
translations.sv: Din lägenhet ligger på tredje våningen.
translations.ro: Apartamentul tău este la etajul trei.
translations.cs: Tvůj byt je ve třetím patře.
translations.da: Din lejlighed ligger på tredje sal.
translations.ja: あなたのアパートは3階にあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; determines 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copula in present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to its complement.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le'; introduces a locative PP.
Ordinal adjective modifying 'étage'.
Noun head of the prepositional complement; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Je cherche un appartement près du métro.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ a.paʁ.tə.mɑ̃ pʁɛ dy me.tʁo/

translations.fr: Je cherche un appartement près du métro.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ a.paʁ.tə.mɑ̃ pʁɛ dy me.tʁo/
translations.en: I’m looking for an apartment near the subway.
translations.es: Busco un piso cerca del metro.
translations.de: Ich suche eine Wohnung in der Nähe der U-Bahn.
translations.it: Cerco un appartamento vicino alla metropolitana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找地铁附近的公寓。
translations.ru: Я ищу квартиру рядом с метро.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um apartamento perto do metrô.
translations.he: אני מחפש דירה ליד הרכבת התחתית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một căn hộ gần tàu điện ngầm.
translations.ar: أبحث عن شقة بالقرب من المترو.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een appartement dicht bij de metro.
translations.hi: मैं मेट्रो के पास एक अपार्टमेंट ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en leilighet nær T-banen.
translations.id: Saya mencari apartemen dekat stasiun kereta bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en lägenhet nära tunnelbanan.
translations.ro: Caut un apartament aproape de metrou.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en lejlighed tæt på metroen.
translations.ja: 地下鉄の近くでアパートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition meaning 'near'; forms the complex preposition 'près de'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; completes 'près de' and introduces the noun complement.
Noun complement of the preposition; object of 'de'.

sentences.target: Notre appartement est petit mais lumineux.

translations.fr: Notre appartement est petit mais lumineux.
translations.en: Our apartment is small but bright.
translations.es: Nuestro piso es pequeño pero luminoso.
translations.de: Unsere Wohnung ist klein, aber hell.
translations.it: Il nostro appartamento è piccolo ma luminoso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的公寓很小但很明亮。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅單位細，但好光猛。
translations.pt: Nosso apartamento é pequeno, mas claro.
translations.vi: Căn hộ của chúng tôi nhỏ nhưng sáng.
translations.nl: Ons appartement is klein maar licht.
translations.hi: हमारा अपार्टमेंट छोटा है, लेकिन रोशन है.
translations.pl: Nasze mieszkanie jest małe, ale jasne.
translations.el: Το διαμέρισμά μας είναι μικρό αλλά φωτεινό.
translations.nb: Leiligheten vår er liten, men lys.
translations.sv: Vår lägenhet är liten men ljus.
translations.ro: Apartamentul nostru este mic, dar luminos.
translations.cs: Náš byt je malý, ale světlý.
translations.da: Vores lejlighed er lille, men lys.
translations.ja: 私たちのアパートは小さいけれど明るいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural); determines 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular construction.
Copula in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; first property attributed to the subject.
Coordinating conjunction introducing contrast between adjectives.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; second property attributed to the subject.
